full_text:
Zhongli Fei 鍾離斐
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhongli Fei (鍾離斐). Officer of Wu. Known for his bold military tactics. Zhongli Fei was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
